name: Religious Events
description: Pooja, Mass, Zakat, Bhajan, Prayers, Nikah and other religious observances.

name: Community Events
description: Annadhanam, welfare drives, social gatherings and community service events.

name: Administrative Events
description: Fee collection, membership drives, organizational meetings and administrative gatherings.

name: Member-Sponsored Events
description: Weddings, Baptisms, naming ceremonies and other events sponsored by members.

name: Off-Premise Services
description: Home prayers, outside marriages and services conducted outside the organization premises.

name: Educational Events
description: Classes, Madarsha sessions, workshops, lectures and educational programmes with batch and syllabus tracking.

name: Emergency Events
description: Flood relief, pandemic response and emergency community support events accepting all donor types.
